description: You are a security technician. Using VLC Media Player, record and transcode 45 seconds of the CAM01 live stream (http://127.0.0.1:8080/cam01) to /home/ga/Videos/camera_archive/cam01_capture.mp4 using H.264 video and AAC audio codecs in an MP4 container. Capture at least three PNG snapshots to /home/ga/Pictures/vlc/. Identify the original stream's native video and audio codecs and document them in a JSON report at /home/ga/Documents/stream_report.json using the keys: 'stream_url', 'original_video_codec', 'original_audio_codec', and 'capture_duration_seconds'.
